itemCodes.exampleHintSuffix: produces values like 0224000016T03 when category is 0224, parent SKU is 2700016, and size is T03.

hpp.title: HPP (Harga Pokok Produksi)
hpp.subtitle: Cost of goods manufactured per work order — fabric, accessories, and service costs
hpp.cardDescription: Per-WO cost breakdown: fabric, accessories, service, margin, and selling price.
hpp.noRows: No work orders match the filters.
hpp.name: Name
hpp.helpIntro: HPP (Harga Pokok Produksi) aggregates fabric, accessories, and service costs per piece. Selling price = HPP × (1 + margin%) + additional cost.
hpp.helpWhenStored: When production receives finished goods (via Work Order receipt), the system stores on each receipt:
hpp.helpMaterialCost: Material cost — total cost of materials issued for that production
hpp.helpAvgCostPerUnit: Avg cost per unit — total cost (e.g. material + CMT if applicable) divided by quantity received
hpp.helpTableExplanation: The table shows for each work order: cost layers, HPP per piece, PPN status (Mixed if costs have mixed PPN), margin, and selling price.
hpp.helpFuture: Labor/CMT and overhead can be included in future updates via WO or allocation rules.

productionColors.filterLogicHint: Categories can be combined (e.g. Pastel + Pink + Cool = cool pastel pink). Filters across categories use AND; chips within one category use OR.
productionColors.favoritesEmpty: You have no favorite colors yet. Star colors on the All Colors page.

productionColors.photoSessionNote: Samples are not saved — they clear when you refresh the page.

import.unmappedSkusHelp: Distinct marketplace variant SKUs in this import that could not be matched to an ERP item.

config.growthHint: Scales every monthly forecast after seasonality. Higher % raises demand; negative % lowers it.
config.lookbackHint: Months of sales history for the baseline. Fewer = reacts faster to recent trends; more = smoother average.
config.decayHint: How fast older months fade within the lookback (0–1). Lower = recent months dominate; near 1.0 = equal weight.

results.searchPlaceholder: Search by SKU or product name…
results.empty: No forecast results. Import sales data and run forecast.
results.unmappedWarn: Over 10% of demand quantity comes from unmapped SKUs. Forecast still runs, but review product mappings in Items / Jubelio settings.

recommendations.CY: Produce to order. Do not stock.

bridge.title: Suggestions to Plan Kerja
bridge.applied: {count} plan rows applied to Plan Kerja {year}.
bridge.appliedPartial: Applied {count} plan rows to Plan Kerja {year}. {skipped} categories skipped.
bridge.note: Creates a parent row per item category (total target) and child rows per selected article (share %). Only selected articles count toward each category total. Monthly distribution, colors, and vendors remain managed in Plan Kerja.
bridge.noPlanYears: No plan years yet. Create one in Plan Kerja first.
bridge.noEditablePlanYears: No editable plan years. Unlock a DRAFT plan in Plan Kerja, or create a new year.
